overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic desert city with modernist architecture. The player navigates from a sunlit paved plaza into a gritty dirt alley, eventually approaching a group of NPCs gathered near a vintage blue car beneath a neon sign.

events.description: turning left around the red-striped parking structure

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit plaza, turning left around a large building while observing the open area ahead

entered.detail: multi-story parking garage with horizontal red and orange stripes
tall palm trees visible against the skyline
tall reflective building in the background
colorful mid-rise building with large digital billboard displaying abstract graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, sunlit urban plaza with modern architecture. The camera turns left around a distinctive red-striped parking structure, revealing palm trees and a colorful building with a teal roof ahead. The ground is paved asphalt, and the area is largely empty of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from paved intersection to dirt alley

events.description: crossing from paved asphalt onto unpaved dirt road surface

agents.ego_description: crossing the paved street and stepping onto the dirt road, continuing forward toward the alley entrance

entered.detail: unpaved dusty road surface replacing the asphalt
tall black metal fence with pointed tops running along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses from the paved plaza onto a dusty dirt road, transitioning into a narrower urban corridor. The colorful teal-roofed building moves to the left side as a black iron fence appears on the right. The environment shifts from clean modern architecture to a grittier, unpaved setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt alley between residential buildings with graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt alley, passing abandoned vehicles and observing the graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: tall modern street lamps with orange Y-shaped tops lining the alley
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
derelict vehicles parked along the left side of the alley

segments.scene_description: Walking down a sunlit dirt alley between buildings, the camera passes abandoned cars and modern orange street lamps. The teal building recedes into the distance on the left while a graffiti-covered wall dominates the right side. The environment feels deserted and post-industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti alley with parked vintage car and NPC gathering

events.description: slowing down while approaching the group of NPCs near the blue car

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe three individuals gathered near a blue vintage car, one appears to be spray-painting the wall

notable_agents.action: three individuals standing near a blue vintage muscle car, one spray-painting graffiti on the wall while others watch

entered.detail: classic blue muscle car with white paint splatter on the side window, parked against the wall
red neon sign reading '2ND AMENDMENT' mounted above the graffiti wall

segments.scene_description: The camera slows while approaching a group of three NPCs gathered around a vintage blue muscle car parked against a graffiti-covered wall. A red neon sign reading '2ND AMENDMENT' hangs above them. One individual in bright red pants appears to be actively spray-painting the wall while the others observe.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a pristine, sunlit urban plaza into a gritty, post-industrial alleyway. It begins by turning around a red-striped parking structure in a wide paved area, passing palm trees and a colorful building with a teal roof. As the camera moves forward, the clean asphalt transitions into a dusty dirt road, narrowing the view into a corridor flanked by a black iron fence. The scene then shifts further into a deserted alley where the teal building recedes, replaced by abandoned cars and graffiti-covered walls under orange street lamps. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches a group of NPCs gathered around a vintage blue muscle car beneath a red neon sign reading 2ND AMENDMENT, where one individual is actively spray-painting the wall.
